title: Zalingei Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zalingei with a Z-Score of +5.14. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Zalingei is causing extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 17.0 GG. 
 The humidity is very low at 8%, and the wind speed is 1.5 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the situation is critical.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
